toolCall.argumentsJson: {"CommandLine":"Write-Host \"Ubuntu-26.04 distro has a corrupted virtual disk from the Ollama model download.\"; Write-Host \"\"; Write-Host \"Two options:\"; Write-Host \"  1. Unregister and reinstall (loses everything installed):\"; Write-Host \"     wsl --unregister Ubuntu-26.04\"; Write-Host \"     wsl --install Ubuntu-26.04 --no-launch\"; Write-Host \"     Then re-run the installer.\"; Write-Host \"\"; Write-Host \"  2.
